productDisplayName: Ganuchi Men Casual Black Casual Shoes
description: Designed for those who never compromise on comfort and style, these high ankle suede boots from ganuchi are a great buy. Slip into them barefoot and pair them with capris and stylish t-shirts for unparalleled cool.UpperSuede upper for absolute style and comfortLeather back heel patch with a nubuck patch near the collar and leather strips on the midfoot and tongue for added shoe structureLace-up system for a snug, customised FitHigh ankle for better lower leg supportFabric inner lining with a padded tongue for breathable, all-day comfortPrinted synthetic leather footbed for all-day comfortButtons on the lateral midfoot and heel patchOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with raised terrace pattern lugs on the forefoot and back foot, horizontal grooves on the toe and back heel, and mildly curved with a brand badge on the midfoot for absolute grip and tractionShoe careUse a suede brush to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
